This is a 'lil weird

To have a website about myself like I'm a business. I made this site so I have a link to put on my resume.

But lately people have been asking what I am up to these days. I tend to collect a lot of hobbies. This is a nice place to put it all in one.

Also this site isn't done yet so if you've stumbled upon this text congrats you've found it in progress. Feel free to explore and send feedback though that'd be fun. @eniki.studio on Instagram.

Product Design Work

I spent three years as a Product Designer at Duality, a San Mateo company, working remotely from Henderson, Nevada.

See Design Work

Artwork

Dark sci-fi series. Fall/Winter 2025

Downloads

Knitting patterns for sale and for free download

The Oatmeal Hat

This hat is a dupe of my favourite store-bought, machine knit, machine sewn hat. For the “store-bought” look, it is in fingering weight yarn and doubled in layer.

Purchase

Cuddle Kerchief

A simple stockinette triangle kerchief for chilly spring days. When it’s too warm for a whole scarf but too cold to keep your neck exposed.

Free Download
